data.user_prompt: What tools help e-commerce businesses manage returns and exchanges?

sections.text:
There are numerous tools available to help e-commerce businesses manage returns and exchanges effectively. Here are the key solutions based on current market offerings:

## Leading Returns Management Platforms

**ReturnLogic** is
the best returns management tool, providing a return portal, inventory management, and powerful analytics dashboards

annotations.title: 10 Best Returns Management Tools for Ecommerce [2024]

sections.text: . It offers
full end-to-end workflow automation on unlimited returns policies

annotations.title: Returns Management Software for Ecommerce Brands | ReturnLogic

sections.text: and helps businesses
streamline returns, cut down on emails, and improve processing time

annotations.title: Returns Management Software for Ecommerce Brands | ReturnLogic
Returns Management Software for Ecommerce Brands | ReturnLogic

sections.text:
.

**Loop Returns** is
leading Shopify DTC tool with exchange-first portal, "shop now" flows, and bonus credit incentives to reduce refund defaults

annotations.title: Best Ecommerce Returns Management Software in 2026

sections.text: . It
supports the full post-purchase experience, from exchanges and returns to tracking, risk, and operations

## Specialized Solutions

**ReturnGO** is a

.

a streamlined, box-free, and label-free return process

return bars - physical locations spread across the nation - allow for in-person returns

## Key Features to Look For

When selecting returns management software, consider these capabilities:

-
Tools to automate and streamline return processes, ultimately enhancing the customer experience

annotations.title: Top 6 Returns Management Software for 2024 | Extensiv

sections.text: Automation software that minimizes human error and accelerates processes like handling customers' return requests through an online portal and generating return shipping labels

annotations.title: 10 Best Returns Management Tools for Ecommerce [2024]

sections.text: Features like exchanges and gift cards that are great for retaining sales, promoting upsell and cross-sell, and ensuring repeat purchases

annotations.title: Best e-commerce returns management software

sections.text: Detailed analytics and reporting capabilities

annotations.title: Top Customer Returns Solutions for E-Commerce (2024)

## Business Impact

Returns management software is crucial because
online retail returns average 24.5%, and 57% of consumers will not shop at stores that do not offer free returns

annotations.title: Best Ecommerce Returns Management Software in 2026

sections.text: . Additionally,
84% of shoppers say that they will not purchase from a retailer again after a bad returns experience

annotations.title: 10 Best Returns Management Tools for Ecommerce [2024]

sections.text:
.

The right software can help businesses
reduce mistakes, optimize resource allocation, and lower costs

annotations.title: Best e-commerce returns management software

sections.text: while
making the process faster and more convenient for customers

annotations.title: 10 Best Returns Management Tools for Ecommerce [2024]

.

These tools range from simple portal solutions starting at $9/month to enterprise-level platforms with custom pricing, allowing businesses of all sizes to find appropriate solutions for their returns management needs.
